title: marathon-decomp: Ranking Marathon Difficulty from Large, Sparse Data: A Robust Latent-Factor Approach
description: Code and a synthetic dataset reproducing the analysis in "Ranking Marathon Difficulty from Large, Sparse Data: A Robust Latent-Factor Approach". The model decomposes marathon finish times into separable athlete and race latent factors to rank race difficulty independently of which runners entered each race. The bundled dataset is synthetic (see data/race_results/manifest.json); the real individual finish records are not redistributed.
